qualification.details: Diploma in Chemical Engineering Diploma in Mechanical Engineering Diploma in Instrumentation Engineering Diploma in Electrical Engineering Diploma in Civil Engineering Diploma in Computer Engineering B.Sc. (Chemistry) Candidates should not have undergone or presently undergoing Apprenticeship Training elsewhere.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KRIBHCO Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KRIBHCO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for KRIBHCO Apprentices recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for KRIBHCO Apprentices recruitment is 22 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for KRIBHCO Apprentices?
faq.answer: The required educational qualifications include Diploma in Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Instrumentation Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Engineering, or B.Sc. (Chemistry).

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the KRIBHCO Apprentices positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the NATS portal. The direct application link will be available in the Important Links section once activated.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for KRIBHCO Apprentices recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates should check the official notification for any updates regarding application fees.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for KRIBHCO Apprentices recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify the age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for age criteria and relaxation details.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the apprenticeship training at KRIBHCO?
faq.answer: The duration of the apprenticeship training is not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details on the training period.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates with prior apprenticeship experience apply?
faq.answer: No, candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training elsewhere are not eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the apprenticeship training take place?
faq.answer: The apprenticeship training will be conducted by Krishak Bharati Cooperative Limited (KRIBHCO) in Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for KRIBHCO Apprentices?
faq.answer: The application mode is strictly online. Only online submissions through the NATS portal will be accepted.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for KRIBHCO Apprentices recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article once released. You can also visit the official KRIBHCO website.
